initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE atom.element = 'H') / COUNT(*), 4) AS hydrogen_percentage
FROM atom
JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = 'TR206';

SELECT 
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'H' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS percentage_hydrogen
FROM atom
JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = 'TR206';
